# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying, accompanied by the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a person discussing the importance of good data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and generate natural voices. Visuals include audio waveforms and shots of data centers and server rooms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video shifts to vibrant in-game footage from Flight Simulator, showing a red biplane flying over coastal and mountainous landscapes, followed by a castle scene with a plane flying nearby. This segment visually demonstrates the immersive and realistic environments within the Flight Simulator game.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus returns to a person explaining the high fidelity and human-like quality of the cognitive services' TTS offerings. The video then cuts to realistic airport ground scenes with an Airbus airplane being marshaled by ground crew, including close-ups of the plane and the airport environment. The audio includes simulated air traffic control communications, enhancing the realism of the simulation.

transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying, accompanied by the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a person discussing the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of a large data center, emphasizing the scale and technology behind the TTS model. The segment concludes with simulated flight scenes showing detailed landscapes and aircraft, highlighting the integration of advanced AI voice technology in flight simulation.
